hero.metaDescription: We help businesses grow faster with SEO & GEO, high-converting websites, AI automation, and WhatsApp lead generation. Get more leads, customers & sales.

slides.description: Data-driven SEO & GEO strategies that put your business on page one and keep qualified leads coming.
Custom websites built with cutting-edge technology that turn visitors into customers.
AI-powered workflows that streamline your operations and free up your team to focus on growth.
Automated customer communication and lead nurturing through WhatsApp's massive reach.
Multi-channel campaigns that deliver high-quality prospects straight to your inbox.

services.title: Everything You Need to
services.description: From SEO & GEO to AI automation, we provide end-to-end digital growth solutions tailored to your business.

list.title: SEO & GEO Services
list.description: Dominate search and AI-generated rankings with data-driven strategies that drive organic traffic and qualified leads.
list.detailedDescription: Our SEO & GEO services are built on data, not guesswork. We optimize your business for both traditional search engines (Google, Bing) and generative AI engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity). From in-depth keyword research and technical site audits to structured data and AI-friendly content, every tactic is designed to drive measurable organic growth across all discovery channels.

process.description: We analyze your website, competitors, and target market to identify opportunities across search and AI engines.
A custom SEO & GEO roadmap built around high-value keywords, technical fixes, and AI-aligned content opportunities.
Meta tags, structured data, content optimization, and schema markup for both search engines and AI crawlers.
Site speed, mobile usability, crawl optimization, and Core Web Vitals improvements.
Authoritative content, Q&A optimization, citation building, and entity-based SEO for generative engine visibility.
Earn high-quality backlinks through digital PR, guest posting, and content marketing.
Transparent monthly reports with keyword rankings, AI mention tracking, traffic data, and actionable insights.

faq.q: How long does SEO & GEO take to show results?
faq.a: Most clients see significant improvements within 3-6 months. However, initial wins like technical fixes, local SEO optimizations, and GEO quick-wins can show impact within 4-6 weeks.

faq.q: Do you guarantee page 1 rankings?
faq.a: No reputable agency can guarantee #1 rankings, as Google's algorithm is complex and ever-changing. We guarantee data-driven strategies, transparent reporting, and continuous optimization to maximize your ranking potential across both search engines and AI platforms.

faq.q: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
faq.a: GEO is the practice of optimizing your content to be cited by AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity. It involves structured data, authoritative citations, Q&A optimization, and entity-based SEO to ensure your brand appears in AI-generated answers.

faq.q: What industries do you specialize in?
faq.a: We work across legal, insurance, healthcare, real estate, hospitality, education, and e-commerce. Our strategies are tailored to each industry's unique competitive landscape.

list.title: Website Design
list.description: High-converting, modern websites built with cutting-edge technology that captivates and converts.
list.detailedDescription: Your website is your digital storefront. We build high-performance websites using Next.js and modern frameworks that load instantly, rank higher on Google, and convert visitors into customers. Every site we build is fully responsive, accessible, and optimized for the best user experience across all devices.

process.description: We learn about your brand, audience, and goals to create a detailed project roadmap.
Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups designed with UX best practices and your brand identity.
Clean, modular code using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS for performance and maintainability.
Copy, images, and media integrated with SEO-friendly structure and metadata.
Cross-browser testing, performance audits, accessibility checks, and bug fixes.
Deployment, analytics setup, and documentation. Ongoing maintenance available.

faq.q: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a: A typical 5-page business website takes 2-4 weeks. More complex projects with custom functionality can take 6-10 weeks.

faq.q: Will my website be mobile-friendly?
faq.a: Absolutely. Every site we build is mobile-first and fully responsive, ensuring a perfect experience on phones, tablets, and desktops.

faq.q: Do you offer hosting and maintenance?
faq.a: Yes. We offer ongoing maintenance and support packages including hosting, security updates, backups, and priority support.

list.title: AI Automation
list.description: Streamline your business with intelligent AI-powered automations that save time and boost efficiency.
list.detailedDescription: AI-powered automation is transforming how businesses operate. We design and implement intelligent systems that handle repetitive tasks, generate content, manage customer interactions, and optimize your workflows. From custom chatbots to automated reporting pipelines, we help you do more with less.

process.description: We map your current workflows to identify high-impact automation opportunities.
Architect the right AI tools and automations for your specific business needs.
Build and integrate AI solutions with your existing tools and platforms.
Rigorous testing and team training to ensure smooth adoption and operation.
Continuous monitoring and refinement to maximize efficiency and ROI.

faq.q: What can AI automation do for my business?
faq.a: AI can handle customer support (chatbots), generate content, automate email sequences, score leads, schedule appointments, generate reports, and much more.

faq.q: Do I need technical skills to use these tools?
faq.a: No. We build user-friendly systems with simple interfaces. We also provide training and documentation so your team can manage day-to-day operations.

faq.q: What tools and platforms do you work with?
faq.a: We integrate with popular tools like Zapier, Make, OpenAI, Google Workspace, Slack, CRMs, and custom APIs to connect your entire tech stack.

list.title: WhatsApp Automation
list.description: Automate customer communication and lead nurturing directly through WhatsApp's massive reach.
list.detailedDescription: WhatsApp is the most widely used messaging platform in West Africa. We help businesses automate their WhatsApp communication — from instant auto-replies and smart lead qualification to broadcast campaigns and full CRM integration. Never miss a lead again.

process.description: We analyze your communication needs, volume, and existing workflows.
Design automated reply flows, lead qualification logic, and broadcast sequences.
Connect WhatsApp Business API with your CRM and other business tools.
End-to-end testing of all flows, messages, and integrations before going live.
Monitor response rates, conversion metrics, and continuously optimize performance.

faq.q: Is this the official WhatsApp API?
faq.a: Yes. We use the official WhatsApp Business API, which is reliable, secure, and complies with WhatsApp's terms of service.

faq.q: Can I still respond manually when needed?
faq.a: Yes. The system handles initial queries and common responses automatically, but you can take over conversations at any point.

faq.q: What CRM do you integrate with?
faq.a: We integrate with popular CRMs like HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, and custom solutions, ensuring your leads flow seamlessly into your sales pipeline.

list.title: Lead Generation
list.description: Multi-channel lead generation campaigns that fill your pipeline with high-quality, ready-to-convert prospects.
list.detailedDescription: Stop chasing leads — let them come to you. Our multi-channel lead generation strategies combine targeted ad campaigns, high-converting landing pages, email outreach, and automated follow-ups to fill your pipeline with qualified prospects who are ready to buy.

process.description: Define your ideal customer profile and identify the best channels to reach them.
Multi-channel plan combining paid ads, content marketing, email, and outreach.
High-converting landing pages and automated email/SMS sequences to nurture leads.
Execute campaigns across selected channels with precise targeting and budgets.
Real-time monitoring, A/B testing, and continuous optimization for maximum ROI.

faq.q: How many leads can I expect?
faq.a: Results vary by industry and budget, but our clients typically see a 200-400% increase in qualified leads within the first 60 days.

faq.q: What channels do you use?
faq.a: We use a mix of Google Ads, Facebook/Instagram ads, LinkedIn outreach, email marketing, SEO, and WhatsApp campaigns depending on your target audience.

faq.q: How do you qualify leads?
faq.a: We use multi-step qualification including form fields, automated scoring, and behavior tracking to ensure you only receive high-intent prospects.

list.title: Local SEO
list.description: Dominate local search and AI-generated local results to bring more nearby customers to your business.
list.detailedDescription: If you serve customers in a specific geographic area, Local SEO is your most powerful growth channel. We optimize your Google Business Profile, build local citations, manage reviews, and create location-specific content to ensure your business appears at the top of local search results, Google Maps, and AI-generated local recommendations.

process.description: Comprehensive review of your current local search presence and competitor landscape.
Full optimization of your GBP with accurate info, categories, photos, and posts.
Build and standardize your business listings across top directories and platforms.
Strategy to generate positive reviews and professionally handle negative feedback.
Location-specific content creation and ongoing rank tracking for local keywords.

faq.q: How long does Local SEO & GEO take?
faq.a: Local SEO improvements can show results in 4-8 weeks, especially Google Business Profile optimizations and citation cleanup.

faq.q: Do you work with multi-location businesses?
faq.a: Yes. We have strategies for businesses with multiple locations, including optimized pages for each location and local link building.

faq.q: What's included in Google Business Profile optimization?
faq.a: Complete profile setup/optimization, category selection, service menu setup, photo/video uploads, posting strategy, and Q&A management.

list.title: SMS Automation
list.description: Develop and customize SMS marketing campaigns that engage customers and drive conversions on the channel with 98% open rates.
list.detailedDescription: SMS marketing offers unparalleled open rates (up to 98%) and instant engagement. We develop customized SMS campaigns — from promotional blasts and appointment reminders to automated drip sequences — that drive conversions and build stronger customer relationships.

process.description: Define campaign goals, target segments, and messaging framework.
Compliant, on-brand SMS templates optimized for engagement and conversions.
Build automated drip sequences triggered by user actions, time, or events.
Opt-in/opt-out management, compliance with local regulations, and consent tracking.
Track delivery rates, open rates, conversions, and refine campaigns for better performance.

faq.q: Is SMS marketing legal?
faq.a: Yes, when done correctly. We ensure all campaigns comply with applicable regulations including opt-in consent, opt-out options, and message frequency limits.

faq.q: What's the typical open rate for SMS?
faq.a: SMS messages have a 98% open rate, with 90% read within 3 minutes. This makes it one of the most effective marketing channels available.

faq.q: Can I send SMS to international numbers?
faq.a: Yes. We work with providers that support global SMS delivery, so you can reach customers wherever they are.

list.title: Social Media Management
list.description: Build your brand presence across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and LinkedIn with content that drives engagement.
list.detailedDescription: Consistent, engaging social media presence is essential for brand building in 2026. We manage your entire social ecosystem — from content strategy and creation to community engagement and analytics — across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and more.

process.description: Understand your brand voice, target audience, and competitive landscape on each platform.
Platform-specific content calendar with the right mix of educational, promotional, and engaging content.
Professional graphic design, copywriting, and short-form video production tailored to each platform.
Daily engagement, comment responses, DM management, and community building.
Monthly performance reports with growth metrics, engagement analysis, and strategy recommendations.

faq.q: Which platforms should my business be on?
faq.a: It depends on your audience. We analyze your target market to recommend the most effective platforms — typically a mix of Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok.

faq.q: How often will you post?
faq.a: We recommend 4-7 posts per week across your active platforms, plus daily stories and engagement. The exact frequency is tailored to your resources and goals.

faq.q: Do you create the content too?
faq.a: Yes. Our team handles graphic design, copywriting, and video production. You simply approve the content calendar and we handle the rest.

list.title: Google Ads & PPC
list.description: High-ROI paid search campaigns on Google that capture intent-driven traffic and convert it into customers.
list.detailedDescription: Google Ads puts your business in front of people actively searching for what you offer. We design and manage high-ROI campaigns across Search, Display, YouTube, and Shopping — with precise targeting, compelling ad copy, and rigorous conversion tracking to ensure every dollar works harder.

process.description: Review current campaigns (if any) and develop a data-driven PPC strategy.
Identify high-intent keywords and build targeted audience segments.
Well-organized campaign structure with compelling ad copy and extensions.
Proper tracking implementation to measure every conversion and calculate true ROAS.
Continuous A/B testing, bid adjustments, and weekly performance reports.

faq.q: What's the minimum budget for Google Ads?
faq.a: We recommend a minimum budget of $500/month for search campaigns to generate meaningful data and results. Display and YouTube campaigns can start with less.

faq.q: How soon will I see results?
faq.a: Campaigns can start driving traffic within hours of launch. We typically need 2-4 weeks to gather enough data for meaningful optimization.

faq.q: Do you manage the ad spend or do I?
faq.a: We manage everything — budget allocation, bid strategies, ad rotation, and audience targeting. You approve the strategy and we handle daily management.

list.title: Social Media Ads
list.description: Targeted Facebook, Instagram and TikTok ad campaigns optimized for lead generation and sales.
list.detailedDescription: Social media advertising offers unmatched targeting precision. We create and manage high-performing ad campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn — with compelling creative, precise audience targeting, and systematic A/B testing to maximize your return on ad spend.

process.description: Build detailed audience profiles based on demographics, interests, behaviors, and lookalikes.
Professional ad creative — images, video, and copy — tailored to each platform and audience.
Structured campaigns with proper tracking, budgets, and bidding strategies.
Systematic testing of creatives, audiences, and placements to find winning combinations.
Data-driven optimization and gradual scaling of profitable campaigns.

faq.q: Which social platform is best for ads?
faq.a: It depends on your audience. Facebook/Instagram excel for B2C and visual products, LinkedIn for B2B, TikTok for younger demographics, and all can work with the right strategy.

faq.q: How do you target the right audience?
faq.a: We use a combination of interest-based targeting, lookalike audiences from your customer data, retargeting, and custom audiences to reach the most relevant prospects.

faq.q: What metrics do you track?
faq.a: We track CTR, CPC, CPM, conversion rate, ROAS, cost per lead, and cost per acquisition — and optimize campaigns based on what matters most to your business.

list.title: Content Creation
list.description: Professional copywriting, short-form video, and graphic design that tells your brand story and drives action.
list.detailedDescription: Great content builds trust, drives traffic, and converts prospects into customers. Our content creation services cover copywriting, blogging, short-form video production, and graphic design — all aligned with your brand voice and optimized for search engines and social platforms.

process.description: Establish your brand's tone, style, and messaging guidelines for consistent content.
Editorial calendar covering blog posts, social content, videos, and marketing collateral.
SEO & GEO-optimized articles, website copy, email sequences, and ad copy.
Professional graphic design and short-form video creation for social media and ads.
Track engagement, traffic, and conversion metrics to refine content strategy.

faq.q: How much content do you produce?
faq.a: We typically produce 4-8 blog posts per month, 15-20 social media graphics, and 4-8 short-form videos — all tailored to your specific needs and budget.

faq.q: Do you optimize content for SEO & GEO?
faq.a: Yes. Every piece of written content is optimized with keyword research, proper headings, meta descriptions, structured data, and internal linking structure for both search engines and AI platforms.

faq.q: Can you match our brand voice?
faq.a: Absolutely. We start with a thorough brand voice analysis and create a style guide before producing any content. Your brand's unique voice is our top priority.

list.title: E-commerce Solutions
list.description: Launch and optimize your online store with Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom builds that maximize conversions.
list.detailedDescription: Ready to sell online? We build and optimize e-commerce stores that are fast, secure, and designed to convert. Whether you need a Shopify store, WooCommerce integration, or a fully custom solution, we handle everything from product page optimization to payment gateway integration.

process.description: Recommend the best e-commerce platform based on your products, volume, and budget.
Custom store design with intuitive navigation, mobile optimization, and branding.
Compelling product descriptions, high-quality images, and SEO-optimized listings.
Integration with local and international payment gateways and shipping providers.
Pre-launch testing, go-live support, and ongoing conversion rate optimization.

faq.q: Which platform is best for my business?
faq.a: Shopify is great for most businesses due to its ease of use and ecosystem. WooCommerce offers more flexibility. We recommend based on your specific needs.

faq.q: Do you integrate African payment methods?
faq.a: Yes. We integrate with Orange Money, MTN MoMo, Wave, Flutterwave, and other popular payment gateways across Africa.

faq.q: Can you migrate my existing store?
faq.a: Yes. We handle data migration from platforms like WooCommerce, Magento, or custom solutions to your new platform with minimal downtime.

list.title: CRM Setup & Automation
list.description: Implement and automate CRM systems that track leads, nurture relationships, and close more deals.
list.detailedDescription: A well-implemented CRM is the backbone of your sales process. We help you choose, set up, and automate the right CRM system — with custom pipelines, automated lead scoring, email integration, and real-time dashboards that give you complete visibility into your sales funnel.

process.description: Evaluate your sales process, team structure, and requirements to recommend the best CRM.
Platform setup, custom fields, pipeline creation, and user permissions configuration.
Automated lead assignment, follow-up sequences, task creation, and email integration.
Clean and import existing contact data, deal history, and custom objects.
Team training, documentation, and ongoing support for smooth adoption.

faq.q: Which CRM do you recommend?
faq.a: We work with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, and custom solutions. Our recommendation depends on your team size, budget, and complexity needs.

faq.q: Can you integrate my CRM with other tools?
faq.a: Yes. We integrate CRMs with email platforms (Gmail, Outlook), marketing tools, WhatsApp, SMS systems, and accounting software.

faq.q: How long does CRM setup take?
faq.a: A basic setup can be done in 1-2 weeks. Complex implementations with custom automations and integrations typically take 3-6 weeks.

list.title: Reputation Management
list.description: Monitor, manage, and improve your online reputation across review platforms and social media.
list.detailedDescription: Your online reputation is one of your most valuable business assets. We monitor review platforms, social media mentions, and search results — then take strategic action to build, protect, and enhance your brand's reputation. From review generation to crisis management, we keep your brand shining.

process.description: Complete assessment of your current online reputation across all platforms.
Implement tools and processes to track reviews, mentions, and sentiment in real-time.
Systematic approach to generating positive reviews and professionally responding to negative ones.
Positive content creation and SEO/GEO to push down negative results and control your narrative.
Monthly reputation reports with review trends, sentiment analysis, and recommendations.

faq.q: Can you remove negative reviews?
faq.a: We cannot directly remove legitimate reviews, but we can help respond professionally, resolve issues, and generate enough positive reviews to minimize their impact.

faq.q: What platforms do you monitor?
faq.a: Google, Facebook, Yelp, Trustpilot, TripAdvisor, and industry-specific platforms. We also monitor social media mentions and news articles.

faq.q: How quickly do you respond to reviews?
faq.a: Our team monitors reviews in real-time and responds to negative reviews within 1-2 hours, often within minutes during business days.

list.title: Maintenance & Support
list.description: Ongoing website care, security monitoring, updates, and technical support to keep your site running smoothly.
list.detailedDescription: Your website needs continuous care to stay secure, fast, and reliable. Our maintenance and support plans cover everything from regular updates and security patches to performance monitoring and priority technical support. We keep your digital assets healthy so you can focus on growing your business.

process.description: Comprehensive audit of your website's current state — security, performance, and code quality.
Choose a maintenance plan that matches your needs, from basic to premium.
Regular updates, security patches, backups, and performance monitoring.
Direct access to our team for urgent issues, with guaranteed response times.
Detailed reports on uptime, performance, security status, and recommendations.

faq.q: What's included in a maintenance plan?
faq.a: Core CMS/plugin updates, security monitoring, daily backups, performance optimization, and priority email support. Premium plans include 24/7 phone support and monthly content updates.

faq.q: Do you offer emergency support?
faq.a: Yes. All plans include priority support with guaranteed response times. Premium plans include 24/7 phone support for critical issues.

faq.q: Can I cancel anytime?
faq.a: Yes. Our maintenance plans are month-to-month with no long-term contract. You can cancel at any time with 30 days notice.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how GrowthPilot Agency collects, uses, and protects your personal data. Our privacy policy explains your rights and our data practices.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: GrowthPilot Agency ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect the following types of information:
items: Personal Data: name, email address, phone number, company name, and website URL when you submit our contact or SEO & GEO audit forms.
Usage Data: pages visited, time spent, browser type, and device information collected via cookies and analytics tools.
Communication Data: any information you provide when you contact us via email, WhatsApp, or other channels.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: To provide, operate, and maintain our services
To respond to your inquiries, requests, and support needs
To send you marketing and promotional communications (with your consent)
To improve our website and services based on usage patterns
To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights

sections.heading: 4. Data Protection
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may employ third-party companies and individuals to facilitate our services, provide analytics, or assist in customer support. These third parties have access to your personal data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

sections.heading: 6. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: The right to access, update, or delete your information
The right to withdraw consent at any time
The right to object to processing of your personal data

sections.heading: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at agyirisakyi3@gmail.com.

terms.metaDescription: Read the Terms of Service for GrowthPilot Agency. Understand the terms governing your use of our digital marketing services and website.
terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the GrowthPilot Agency website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access our services.

sections.heading: 2. Services Description
sections.content: GrowthPilot Agency provides digital marketing services including but not limited to SEO & GEO, website design, AI automation, WhatsApp automation, and lead generation. The scope, deliverables, and timeline of each project will be outlined in a separate service agreement.

sections.heading: 3. User Responsibilities
sections.content: As a user of our services, you agree to:
items: Provide accurate and complete information when using our forms or services
Use our services only for lawful purposes and in compliance with applicable laws
Not engage in any activity that could harm, disrupt, or impair our website or services
Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of our systems

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, materials, designs, and code provided by GrowthPilot Agency are the intellectual property of GrowthPilot Agency unless otherwise stated. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: 5. Payment Terms
sections.content: Payment terms for services will be specified in individual service agreements. Failure to make timely payments may result in suspension or termination of services. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated in writing.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: GrowthPilot Agency shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use or inability to use our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the specific service giving rise to the claim.

sections.heading: 7. Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our services immediately, without prior notice, for any violation of these Terms of Service or for any other reason deemed necessary.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this page. Your continued use of our services after any modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Côte d'Ivoire. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire.

sections.heading: 10. Contact Information
sections.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please reach out to us at agyirisakyi3@gmail.com or visit our Contact page.
